message:
Rewrite expression linearity detection, refactor groupby to preserve Scalar types, and fix JSON/recovery edge cases

- Redefine is_linear() to mean "references exactly one series" by
  extracting all series names from the expression tree, replacing the
  previous recursive structural check that incorrectly classified
  multi-series expressions (e.g. col_a + col_b) as linear; update
  corresponding test assertions to match the corrected semantics
- Refactor groupby aggregation to accumulate Vec<Scalar> instead of
  Vec<f64>, delegating to fp_types nan-aware functions (nansum, nanmean,
  nanmin, nanmax, nanvar, nanstd, nanmedian, nancount) so that integer
  and string group values are preserved through First/Last without
  forced f64 conversion
- Fix JSON records reader to collect column names from all records
  instead of only the first, handling heterogeneous/sparse JSON where
  different records have different key sets
- Add decode error handling in asupersync recovery loop so a corrupted
  payload triggers retry logic instead of immediately propagating the
  error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
